title: Amtech B2330 6 Inch (150mm) Mini Cable Cutter, Wire Cutters, Plier
features: Suitable for: The Mini Cable Cutter works with mild steel, copper, aluminium, and soft iron. The blade of this cutter is especially designed for effective cable cutting and wire stripping.
Construction: The cutter is made up of hardened carbon steel, making it long-lasting and durable.
Soft grip: The ergonomic designed soft grip handles makes the cable cutter comfortable to hold and use.
Size: The size of this wire cutter is 150mm (6 inches)
description: Product Description Strip and cut your cables with Amtech’s Mini Cable Cutter. The cable-gripping jaws and high leverage design makes cable-cutting easier than ever. With ergonomic, soft-grip handles, this makes a tool that’s comfortable to use for extended lengths of time. Made up of hardened carbon steel, the cutter makes for a long-lasting, durable tool for you to keep in your toolbox. Suitable for materials such as copper, aluminium, soft iron, and other general steel cables and wires. Safety Warning No
